evals.prompt: Coordinate three Codex terminals working on one GitHub issue. Define the shared status file and handoff expectations.
evals.expected_output: Establishes STATUS.md as concise hot team memory and STATUS.archive.md as cold history, with active work, completion contract, current handoff, current gates, review threads, completed summaries, and decision history.
assertions: Requires each role to read STATUS.md before acting and update it after meaningful state changes.
Defines ownership, branch/worktree, phase, cycle count, and current blocker fields.
Keeps logs concise and links or summarizes evidence instead of pasting full output.
Moves completed contracts, old handoffs, checker logs, completed retrospectives, stale review bodies, and old gate output to STATUS.archive.md.
Requires STATUS.md worktree and cleanliness notes to match git worktree list and git status before completion.
